creator: xenophon+fbsdports@irtnog.org
text:
A free and open source content management system for publishing content on the World Wide Web and intranets.  It is based on Django and written in Python.

Please note that www/py-django-cms requires an updated version of www/py-django-classy-tags (ref. ports/164623) as well as a new port, www/py-django-sekizai (ref. ports/164622).

Fix: 

https://web.irtnog.org/Members/xenophon/py-django-cms.shar.txt
